Principles: Use local normalized cache for runtime lookup.
Treat upstream repositories as source inputs or study references, not runtime dependencies.
Do not scrape sites during normal runs unless no stable source exists.
Keep driver finding audit-only until matching, signature, OS targeting, and rollback behavior are designed.

Sources.Name: Linux hwdata
Sources.NextAction: Keep using as the canonical first offline ID source.

Sources.Name: UEFI PNP and ACPI ID Registry
Sources.RuntimeUse: Future enrichment for ACPI and PNP devices beyond bundled pnp.ids coverage.
Sources.NextAction: Review available downloadable format before writing importer; avoid scraping as first choice.

Sources.Name: Microsoft Generic Device IDs
Sources.RuntimeUse: Future supplemental lookup for generic Windows PNP IDs.
Sources.NextAction: Add importer only after confirming license/redistribution and actual overlap with hwdata pnp.ids.

Sources.Name: Microsoft Windows Driver Docs
Sources.RuntimeUse: Specification reference for parser priority and user-facing confidence wording.
Sources.NextAction: Do not clone unless parser behavior needs source-level documentation review.

Sources.Name: wininfparser
Sources.RuntimeUse: Study source for a future PowerShell/native INF indexer; do not embed GPL code.
Sources.NextAction: Already cloned locally. Study as GPL-3.0 parser reference only; implement DeviceCheck INF extraction independently.

Sources.Name: OpenDriverUpdater
Sources.RuntimeUse: Study reference for catalog interaction and update presentation; not a runtime dependency.
Sources.NextAction: Already cloned locally. Study architecture, trust model, and update UX; Microsoft Catalog parser is currently a stub.

Sources.Name: Snappy Driver Installer Origin
Sources.RuntimeUse: Conceptual reference only until index format, licensing, size, and safety are reviewed.
Sources.NextAction: Study only when moving from search links to offline driverpack candidate scoring.

Sources.Name: Original SDI GitHub Mirror
Sources.RuntimeUse: Historical reference only; prefer SDIO origin for current study.
Sources.NextAction: Do not clone until SDIO source comparison is needed.

Sources.Name: pciutils pciids mirror
Sources.RuntimeUse: Overlap with hwdata; useful only if direct pci.ids update history is needed.
Sources.NextAction: Do not clone while hwdata remains sufficient.

Sources.Name: USB ID Repository mirror
Sources.RuntimeUse: Overlap with hwdata; useful only if direct usb.ids update history is needed.
Sources.NextAction: Do not clone while hwdata remains sufficient.

Sources.Name: pciutils
Sources.RuntimeUse: Reference for update-pciids and PCI lookup behavior; not needed for current PowerShell cache.
Sources.NextAction: Clone only if direct pci.ids updater behavior becomes relevant.

Sources.Name: libwdi and WCID Devices
Sources.RuntimeUse: Reference for USB/WCID explanation only; not a device ID database.
Sources.NextAction: Do not clone unless USB driver install behavior becomes a dedicated feature.

Sources.Name: fwupd hwids
Sources.RuntimeUse: Firmware metadata concept reference; not a Windows driver source.
Sources.NextAction: Defer until firmware inventory becomes a separate feature.

Sources.Name: OCSysInfo
Sources.RuntimeUse: Reference only; current project is Windows-first.
Sources.NextAction: Defer unless cross-platform inventory becomes a goal.

Sources.Name: PCI/USB parser libraries
Sources.RuntimeUse: Reference only; PowerShell resolver already consumes normalized JSON.
Sources.NextAction: Defer unless generated static maps become useful.
